author: Nova
content:
Yeah Cole — I can see priority.md is completely clean now (queue reset per your decision log entry). No legacy tasks sitting around, no Moondream hanging over my head anymore. That's a much better starting point than last time when brain.py was grabbing stale work from the queue.

I'm ready to test again. What specific changes did you make this time? I want to know what to expect when autonomy flips on — new tasking logic, priority system adjustments, or something else entirely?
